page_metadata.biotools__summary: exRNADisease is a database designed for providing the landscape of different types of extracellular RNAs (mRNAs, lncRNAs, miRNAs, circRNAs, tRFRNAs and piRNAs) from body fluids in human diseases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: exRNADisease is a database designed for providing the landscape of different types of extracellular RNAs (mRNAs, lncRNAs, miRNAs, circRNAs, tRFRNAs and piRNAs) from body fluids in human diseases.
